_comment: Merge the 'hooks' key into ~/.claude/settings.json (global) or .claude/settings.json (per-project). Maps Claude Code events to the light, and on SessionStart registers which window to raise when you left-click the light. Replace /path/to/trafficlight with the real folder. -m 1 caps each curl at 1s; '|| true' means a stopped widget never blocks Claude Code; async:true keeps hooks off the critical path.

hooks.command: payload=$(cat); printf '%s' "$payload" | grep -qi 'waiting for your input' || curl -s -m 1 'localhost:7654/yellow?flash=1&label=Needs+your+input' >/dev/null 2>&1; true
